description: At the Hydra facility, Ruby and Werner continue to pressure Fitz and Simmons, threatening violence unless they work faster. Fitz creates a ruse to stall, but Ruby's unpredictable and dangerous temperament escalates the threat. Tensions mount as they realize their lives are truly at stake, and stakes for Earth's fate grow higher.
location: Hydra facility (abandoned English nuclear silo / Particle Infusion Chamber site)

transcript.line: Since you were taking a while. Is this above your grade level?
No, no, no, no. They're S.H.I.E.L.D.'s best and brightest. There's nothing they can't do if motivated.
Torturing us isn't going to make us work any faster.
Well, you didn't seem to mind torture the last time we met. Electrocuting me. You two didn't have wedding rings, then, either.
Please. We're doing what you asked.
The infuser's reversed. They're gonna have to start over.
You know, I only really need one of you. Two is starting to feel redundant.
Hey, we're working with very limited resources on a very old machine.
Fitz! No! Stop it! Leave him alone! We'll fix it! We'll fix it!
Hey. Eyes up. Look at me. Next time, it's her. And I won't use my fists.
